results.title: Cheesohm announces next edition of “Dance with Cheesohm” after Afrobeats class in Lekki
results.description: Nigerian lifestyle influencer, content creator and dance enthusiast Ntumobe Chisom, popularly known as Cheesohm, has announced the next edition of "Dance with Cheesohm", following the success of her recent Afro Beats dance class held in Lekki, Lagos. The post Cheesohm announces next edition of “Dance with Cheesohm” after Afrobeats class in Lekki appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: At least 90 dead in China's worst coal mine disaster in over 16 years - Sat, 23 May 2026 PST
results.description: SHANGHAI – At least 90 people were killed in a gas explosion at a coal mine in China’s northern province of Shanxi, the country’s deadliest mining accident since at least 2009.

results.title: Venezuela’s Machado vows another run for presidency and eyes a return from exile by end of 2026
results.description: PANAMA CITY, Panama (AP) — Venezuela’s Nobel Peace Prize laureate María Corina Machado announced on Saturday that she plans to run for president again and intends to return to her home country before the end of 2026. Machado’s remarks, made while meeting in Panama with several fellow Venezuelan opposition leaders, come more than four months...

results.title: Jordy Frahm, Nebraska softball end Oklahoma State season to earn WCWS trip
results.description: Nebraska softball turned a pitchers' duel into a blowout to end Oklahoma State’s season with a 9-1 run-rule decision to sweep the Lincoln Super Regional on Saturday at Bowlin Stadium.

results.title: Meyer and Hicks lead the Marlins to a 4-1 win over the punchless Mets
results.description: MIAMI (AP) — Max Meyer threw seven shutout innings of one-hit ball, Liam Hicks homered twice and the Miami Marlins beat the punchless New York Mets 4-1 on Saturday.

results.title: Active Shooter Reported Near Roman Forest Texas, Multiple Victims Reported

Police are responding to a reported active shooter situation in the Kings Colony area near Roman Forest, where multiple people have reportedly been shot. Authorities said the incident is unfolding near Nottingham Road in the Kings Colony neighborhood.
